description_long: This is a modern row house complex featuring three attached units, each with a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade. The front elevation displays a mix of white, gray, and brown panels, with large rectangular windows and recessed balconies above the main entrances. The ground level includes individual entryways for each unit, set back from a striped green and white area that likely represents driveways or walkways. The rear of the building is more austere, with a uniform arrangement of windows and doors, and minimal decorative elements. The roof is flat and features several small rooftop structures, possibly for ventilation or access. The overall design emphasizes straight lines, minimal ornamentation, and a functional, urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, three-unit row house with flat roofs, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and brown facade panels. The design is geometric and urban, with recessed balconies and rooftop structures.
description_view_0: Front view showing three distinct house units, each with a mix of white, gray, and brown panels, large windows, and recessed balconies above the entryways.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the building, the flat roof, and the striped green and white ground area extending along the length.
description_view_2: Rear view with a uniform white facade, regularly spaced windows and doors, and minimal decorative features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the length of the building and the flat roof, with green and white ground stripes.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryways with large glass doors, no porch, and minimal overhang, set within a striped driveway or walkway area.
